## What

Brief description of the change and why it was made.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test / docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` if this is user-facing

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know: design trade-offs, follow-up work, testing limitations.
